title: Las Estaciones

seo.metaTitle: Las Estaciones - Learn Seasons in Spanish for Kids | Beibei Amigos
seo.metaDescription: Free interactive Spanish book teaching preschoolers the four seasons! Learn primavera, verano, otoño, and invierno with fun illustrations and pronunciation guides. Perfect for ages 2-5.

learningObjectives: Learn the names of the four seasons in Spanish

educationalValue.repetitionPattern: Each season is introduced with consistent structure
educationalValue.culturalContext: Universal concept of seasons with engaging visuals
educationalValue.parentEngagement: Question page invites conversation about favorite season

technicalDetails.accessibility: Pronunciation guides, bilingual text, emoji visual aids
